name: He Jing
page_title: He Jing 賀景 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: He Jing was one of He Qi’s sons along with He Da. He is recorded as having been strict, but kind, but unfortunately he died young. His son, He Shao, is recorded in history, but in no capacity beyond his name.

full_text:
He Jing 賀景
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Jing (賀景)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Strict but kind. Died young. He Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
He Jing was one of He Qi’s sons along with He Da. He is recorded as having been strict, but kind, but unfortunately he died young. His son, He Shao, is recorded in history, but in no capacity beyond his name.
